raw_block:
–1. A son of Uzziel, helps carry the bodies of Nadab and Abihu 
out of the campEx 6:22;Le 10:4
–2. A Jew who stood by Ezra when he read the law to the peopleNe 8:4
–3. Also called MESHACH
  .One of three Hebrew young men trained with Daniel at the court 
of BabylonDa 1:6,7,11-20
  .Assists Daniel in interpreting Nebuchadnezzars dreamDa 2:17-23
  .Thrown into the fiery furnaceDa 3:13-30
